what_it_does: Stores YAML front-matter metadata for a channel-memory attachment that points to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter and no body content.
It records an added timestamp of '2026-06-24T00:38:11.466920+00:00'.
standouts: The only substantive signal is the board://item-76b57ae6 target reference.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Follows the att-* naming convention for attachments.
concerns: The file has no descriptive content beyond the target reference, so its purpose is opaque without the referenced board item.
notes: This is a bare attachment metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item item-76b57ae6.
questions: What is the content or title of board://item-76b57ae6?
Why was this attachment created and what does it annotate?
Is there a missing body or description that should accompany the metadata?
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing channel memory to board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific channel attachment is associated with a particular board item, preserving when that association was added.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel-memory attachment and a board item, which a fused system could use to correlate discussion artifacts with board entries.
summary_for_embedding: YAML metadata attachment file att-9aa331a5 in the dragnet-development channel records a board_items link to board://item-76b57ae6 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Capture the association between a channel attachment and a specific board item at a recorded point in time.
